message:
feat(fp-io): SqlReadOptions::schema for cross-schema reads (br-u6zn / fd90.14)

Closes br-frankenpandas-u6zn (fd90.14). Wires the schema-introspection probes from fd90.13 into the read_sql_table_with_options path so cross-schema reads dispatch correctly without leaking concrete backend types.

- SqlReadOptions gains schema: Option<String>. Backwards compatible (struct-literal sites updated to schema: None).
- New private helper sql_select_all_query_in_schema(conn, table, schema) builds the schema-qualified FROM clause when conn.supports_schemas() is true; ignores schema=Some on backends that report false (SQLite); validates schema name through the same alphanumeric+underscore policy as table names (prevents injection through the qualifier).
- read_sql_table_with_options + read_sql_table_chunks_with_options route schema through the new helper. read_sql_table (no options) and read_sql_table_chunks (no options) keep the bare-table behavior unchanged.

4 new unit tests:
- bare path on a default-schema-aware stub (None and Some both yield SELECT * FROM "users").
- qualified path on a multi-schema stub (Some yields SELECT * FROM "analytics"."users").
- SQLite silently ignores schema=Some (preserves existing user pipelines).
- malformed schema name rejected via IoError::Sql 'invalid table name'.

rch: 264 fp-io tests pass (260 prior + 4 new), cargo clippy -p fp-io --all-targets -D warnings clean, ubs Critical=0 exit 0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
